recommendations.title: Angst
recommendations.overview: A killer is released from prison and breaks into a remote home to kill a woman, her handicapped son and her pretty daughter.

recommendations.title: You Should Have Left
recommendations.overview: In an effort to repair their relationship, a couple books a vacation in the countryside for themselves and their daughter. What starts as a perfect retreat begins to fall apart as one loses their grip on reality, and a sinister force tries to tear th

recommendations.title: The Poker House
recommendations.overview: Agnes and her two sisters struggle through a day in a home overrun by gamblers, thieves, and johns.

recommendations.title: Return
recommendations.overview: A young couple purchase their new home to start a life together, only to find out the elderly couple next door have other plans for them.

recommendations.title: Ghost House
recommendations.overview: A young couple go on an adventurous vacation to Thailand only to find themselves haunted by a malevolent spirit after naively disrespecting a Ghost House.

recommendations.title: Marrowbone
recommendations.overview: A young man and his three younger siblings are plagued by a sinister presence in the sprawling manor in which they live.

recommendations.title: American Poltergeist
recommendations.overview: A group of friends move into a vacation home with a sinister past in Fall River, Massachusetts. Suspicious of the home's owner, Taryn feels a strong connection to the house and finds herself at the center of one of the most deadly poltergeists in Ame

recommendations.title: Welcome Home
recommendations.overview: A couple try to repair their damaged union in an Italian vacation paradise. Then they discover the owner's intentions.

recommendations.title: The Untamed
recommendations.overview: A meteorite deposits an alien monster with strange powers near the home of an unhappy couple.

recommendations.title: Superhost
recommendations.overview: Two travel vloggers check into a vacation rental with a host that will do anything for a good review.
